标题: Jil Sander grey shadow trousers embody minimalist comfort and high-end expression. Made with the brand's signature minimalist design, these trousers combine soft cotton fabric with delicate fleece lining, striking a perfect balance between comfort and luxury. The outer fabric is crafted from 100% combed cotton, dyed using a special process to create a natural grey shadow texture with subtle color variations, breaking the monotony of plain grey trousers. The fabric is soft, durable, and resistant to pilling and deformation, suitable for daily wear. The fleece lining is soft and fluffy, providing warmth without causing sweat, enhancing the drape of the trousers and creating a smooth silhouette when in motion. The trousers feature a straight wide-leg cut with a high waist, flattering the legs and elongating the proportions while maintaining a relaxed fit. The wide elastic waistband with contrasting drawstring and metal aglets adds a visual touch, while the textured side panels and neat back pocket stitching enhance the minimalist design. Available in sizes XS to L.

Jil Sander metal blue cotton straight-leg pants embody a minimalist and comfortable high-end aesthetic. These pants feature the brand's signature minimalist design language, blending soft cotton fabric with subtle metallic texture to create a piece that is both comfortable and luxurious for everyday wear. Made from 100% combed cotton, the outer layer showcases a delicate metallic blue mottled texture through special dyeing and finishing processes, adding a subtle sheen that elevates the visual appeal. The inner lining is fleece-treated for a soft and skin-friendly feel, providing warmth without feeling stuffy in autumn and winter, while enhancing the fabric's drape for a sleek silhouette. The fabric undergoes pre-washing to prevent shrinking and pilling, ensuring durability for frequent wear. The straight-leg cut features a classic high-waisted silhouette with a smooth straight line from waist to hem. The waistband is designed with a wide elastic band and a drawstring in the same color, finished with a black metal cap at the end for a refined touch. The combination of hidden slant pockets on both sides and a back patch pocket balances practicality with simple design, with neat stitching on the patch pocket enhancing the overall structure. Available in sizes XS-L: XS: Waist 74, Hip 64, Length 104; S: Waist 78, Hip 66, Length 105; M: Waist 82, Hip 68, Length 106; L: Waist 86, Hip 70, Length 107.

JIL Sander brown cashmere-textured fleece-lined casual pants embody the fusion of minimalism and winter warmth. The pants feature a subtle brown color with a delicate visual texture resembling cashmere, yet made of 100% cotton skin-friendly fabric with a fleece lining for a cozy nest in chilly autumn and winter. The elastic waistband with a delicate drawstring and metal cord ends exudes a refined detail. The loose wide-leg cut offers a casual and relaxed style while cleverly enhancing the leg shape. The practical layout of front and back pockets, along with the minimalist back pocket design, adds a touch of sophistication to the brand's style. From daily commutes to casual outings, these pants effortlessly adapt to various occasions, embodying JIL SANDER's "less is more" aesthetic in every fabric and cut, allowing you to exude a high-end relaxed winter atmosphere in a minimalist silhouette. Men's style, brown color, available in sizes XS to L. Measurements (flat lay, 1-3cm error): XS: Waist 73cm, Crotch 33cm, Thigh 66cm, Length 105cm S: Waist 76cm, Crotch 34cm, Thigh 68cm, Length 106cm M: Waist 79cm, Crotch 35cm, Thigh 70cm, Length 107cm L: Waist 82cm, Crotch 36cm, Thigh 72cm, Length 107cm. Note: The waistband is elastic and can stretch about 8cm per size. Size recommendations: XS for under 135 pounds; S for 135-150 pounds; M for 150-170 pounds; L for 170-185 pounds.

Jil Sander Color Block Wool Wide Leg Pants: These color block wide leg pants are made of custom blended wool fabric, combining the soft warmth of wool with the delicate texture of yarn. The off-white main tone with subtle texture is complemented by a contrasting deep brown waistband, creating visual depth in a minimalist silhouette. The milk silk lining inside feels smooth and skin-friendly, breaking the stereotype of wool being itchy. Details reflect the brand's minimalist philosophy: the deep brown drawstring with metal tips adds a touch of sophistication to the casual style; the simple single back pocket design and wide leg cut not only flatter the legs but also exude a laid-back vibe when walking. Whether paired with a matching wool sweater for a sophisticated work look or clashed with an oversized hoodie for a casual style, these pants embody a "minimalist yet warm" quality, serving as a key piece for comfortable and stylish outfits in the fall and winter seasons. Sizes available: XS-L.
